inputs.label: Age
inputs.businessContext: Age for estimating maximum heart rate (220 - age) if max HR is not directly measured

businessContext_i18n.en: Age for estimating maximum heart rate (220 - age) if max HR is not directly measured
businessContext_i18n.tr: Maksimum kalp atış hızını tahmin etmek için yaş (220 - yaş); maksimum kalp atış hızı doğrudan ölçülmemişse kullanılır
businessContext_i18n.de: Alter zur Schätzung der maximalen Herzfrequenz (220 - Alter), wenn die maximale HF nicht direkt gemessen wird
businessContext_i18n.fr: Âge pour estimer la fréquence cardiaque maximale (220 - âge) si la FC max n'est pas mesurée directement
businessContext_i18n.es: Edad para estimar la frecuencia cardíaca máxima (220 - edad) si la FC máxima no se mide directamente

inputs.label: Resting Heart Rate
inputs.businessContext: Resting heart rate measured in the morning

businessContext_i18n.en: Resting heart rate measured in the morning
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sabah ölçülen dinlenme kalp atış hızı
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fréquence cardiaque au repos mesurée le matin
businessContext_i18n.es: Frecuencia cardíaca en reposo medida por la mañana

inputs.label: Maximum Heart Rate
inputs.businessContext: Maximum heart rate; if unknown, use 220 - age

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum heart rate; if unknown, use 220 - age
businessContext_i18n.tr: Maksimum kalp atış hızı; bilinmiyorsa 220 - yaş kullanın
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximale Herzfrequenz; falls unbekannt, 220 - Alter verwenden
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fréquence cardiaque maximale ; si inconnue, utiliser 220 - âge
businessContext_i18n.es: Frecuencia cardíaca máxima; si se desconoce, use 220 - edad

inputs.label: Intensity Lower Limit
inputs.businessContext: Lower percentage of heart rate reserve for the target training zone

businessContext_i18n.en: Lower percentage of heart rate reserve for the target training zone
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hedef antrenman bölgesi için kalp atış hızı rezervinin alt yüzdesi
businessContext_i18n.de: Unterer Prozentsatz der Herzfrequenzreserve für die Ziel-Trainingszone
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage inférieur de la réserve de fréquence cardiaque pour la zone d'entraînement cible
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje inferior de la reserva de frecuencia cardíaca para la zona de entrenamiento objetivo

inputs.label: Intensity Upper Limit
inputs.businessContext: Upper percentage of heart rate reserve for the target training zone

businessContext_i18n.en: Upper percentage of heart rate reserve for the target training zone
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hedef antrenman bölgesi için kalp atış hızı rezervinin üst yüzdesi
businessContext_i18n.de: Oberer Prozentsatz der Herzfrequenzreserve für die Ziel-Trainingszone
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage supérieur de la réserve de fréquence cardiaque pour la zone d'entraînement cible
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje superior de la reserva de frecuencia cardíaca para la zona de entrenamiento objetivo
